enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Local Area Banks - Debit
Card: Issuance and Conduct) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: Bank of India (Local Area Banks - Debit Card: Issuance and Conduct) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: These Directions shall come into force with immediate effect.
enriched_requirements.object: immediate effect

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be applicable to Local Area Banks (hereinafter collectively
referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank').
enriched_requirements.object: Area Banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These directions cover the general and conduct regulations relating to debit cards
(including co-branded debit cards) which shall be read along with prudential, payment
and technology & cyber security related directions applicable to debit and co-branded
debit cards, as issued by the Reserve Bank.
enriched_requirements.object: prudential, payment and technology & cyber security related directions applicable to debit and co-branded debit cards, as issued by

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In these Directions, unless the context otherwise requires, the terms herein shall bear
the meanings assigned to them below:
(1) Cardholders are person/s to whom a card is issued or one who is authorized to use
an issued card.
enriched_requirements.object: to them below: (1) Cardholders are person/s to whom a card is issued or one who is authorized to use an issued card

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(6) Debit Card is a physical or virtual payment instrument containing a means of
identification, linked to a Saving Bank / Current Account which can be used to
withdraw cash, make online payments, do PoS terminal / Quick Response (QR)
code transactions, fund transfer, etc.
enriched_requirements.object: a Saving Bank / Current Account which can be used to withdraw cash, make online payments, do PoS terminal / Quick Respons

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All other expressions unless defined herein shall have the same meaning as have been
assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 or the Reserve Bank of India
Act, 1934 or any statutory modification or re-enactment thereto or as used in commercial
parlance, as the case may be.
enriched_requirements.object: as have been assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 or the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934 or any statutory mod

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall formulate comprehensive policy / policies and procedures with the approval
of its Board covering, inter alia, the following aspects:
(1) Debit card issuance.
enriched_requirements.object: policies and procedures with the approval of its Board covering, inter alia, the following aspects: (1) Debit card is

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Banks shall formulate a Board-approved comprehensive debit cards issuance policy and
issue debit cards in accordance with the same.
enriched_requirements.object: debit cards issuance policy and issue debit cards in accordance with the same

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Debit cards shall only be issued to customers having Savings Bank / Current Accounts.
enriched_requirements.object: customers having Savings Bank / Current Accounts

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: No bank shall issue debit cards to cash credit / loan accounts.
enriched_requirements.object: cash credit / loan accounts

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Banks shall not force a customer to avail debit card facility and shall not link issuance of
debit card to availment of any other facility from the bank.
enriched_requirements.object: avail debit card facility and shall not link issuance of debit card to availment of any other facility from the bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The banks shall undertake review of their operations / issue of debit cards on half-yearly
basis.
enriched_requirements.object: operations / issue of debit cards on half-yearly basis

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The review shall include, inter-alia, card usage analysis including cards not used
for long durations and the inherent risks therein.
enriched_requirements.object: analysis including cards not used for long durations and the inherent risks therein

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers may issue other form factors in place of / in addition to a plastic debit card
such as wearables, after obtaining explicit consent from the customer.
enriched_requirements.object: in place of / in addition to a plastic debit card such as wearables, after obtaining explicit consent from the customer

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Form factors shall be subject to all the specific and general guidelines applicable to the
respective cards.
enriched_requirements.object: the specific and general guidelines applicable to the respective cards

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers shall provide options for disabling or blocking the form factor in line with
the instructions issued by the Reserve Bank from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: or blocking the form factor in line with the instructions issued by the Reserve Bank from time to time

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The co-branding arrangement shall be as per the Board approved policy of the card-
issuer.
enriched_requirements.object: Board approved policy of the card- issuer

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The policy shall specifically address issues pertaining to various risks, including
reputation risk associated with such an arrangement and put in place suitable risk
mitigation measures.
enriched_requirements.object: to various risks, including reputation risk associated with such an arrangement and put in place suitable risk

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the information relating to revenue sharing between the
card-issuer and the cobranding partner entity shall be indicated to the cardholder and
also displayed on the website of the card-issuer.
enriched_requirements.object: cardholder and also displayed on the website of the card-issuer

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In addition to the conditions listed herein, the co-branding arrangement for
debit cards and prepaid cards shall also be subject to the specific conditions applicable
to such cards.
enriched_requirements.object: the specific conditions applicable to such cards

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The co-branded card shall explicitly indicate that the card has been issued under a
cobranding arrangement.
enriched_requirements.object: card has been issued under a cobranding arrangement

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The co-branding partner shall not advertise / market the
cobranded card as its own product.
enriched_requirements.object: cobranded card as its own product

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In all marketing / advertising material, the name of
the card-issuer shall be clearly shown.
The co-branded card shall prominently bear the branding of the card-issuer.
enriched_requirements.object: of the card-issuer

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers shall carry out due diligence in respect of the co-branding partner entity
with which they intend to enter into tie-up for issue of such cards to protect themselves
against the reputation risk they are exposed to in such an arrangement.
enriched_requirements.object: in respect of the co-branding partner entity with which they intend to enter into tie-up for issue of such cards to protect th

conditions: where the proposed co-branding partner is a financial entity
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers
shall ensure that in cases where the proposed co-branding partner is a financial entity,
it has obtained necessary approvals from its regulator for entering into the co-branding
arrangement.
enriched_requirements.object: where the proposed co-branding partner is a financial entity, it has obtained necessary approvals from its regulator for entering

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Card-issuers shall also be liable for the acts of the co-branding partner.
enriched_requirements.object: the acts of the co-branding partner

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The card-issuer
shall ensure adherence to the Reserve Bank of India (Local Area Banks - Managing
Risks in Outsourcing) Directions, 2025, as amended from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: Reserve Bank of India (Local Area Banks - Managing Risks in Outsourcing) Directions, 2025, as amended from time to time

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers
shall ensure that cash backs, discounts and other offers advertised by a co-branding
partner are delivered to the cardholder on time.
enriched_requirements.object: discounts and other offers advertised by a co-branding partner are delivered to the cardholder on time

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers shall be liable for any delay
or non-delivery of the same to the cardholders.
enriched_requirements.object: delay or non-delivery of the same to the cardholders

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The role of the co-branding partner entity under the tie-up arrangement shall be limited
to marketing / distribution of the cards and providing access to the cardholder for the
goods / services that are offered.
enriched_requirements.object: / distribution of the cards and providing access to the cardholder for the goods / services that are offered

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The co-branding partner (CBP) shall not have access to information relating to
transactions undertaken through the co-branded card irrespective of any other service
offered by them to the card-issuer.
enriched_requirements.object: relating to transactions undertaken through the co-branded card irrespective of any other service offered by them to the ca

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Post issuance of the card, the CBP shall not be
involved in any of the processes or the controls relating to the co-branded card except
for being the initial point of contact in case of grievances.
enriched_requirements.object: of the processes or the controls relating to the co-branded card except for being the initial point of contact in case of grievance

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
However, for the purpose of
cardholder's convenience, card transaction related data may be drawn directly from the
card-issuer's system in an encrypted form and displayed in the CBP's platform with
robust security.
enriched_requirements.object: the card-issuer's system in an encrypted form and displayed in the CBP's platform with robust security

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The information displayed through the CBP's platform shall be visible
only to the cardholder and shall neither be accessed nor be stored by the CBP.
enriched_requirements.object: the cardholder and shall neither be accessed nor be stored by the CBP

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A co-
branding partner (CBP) acting as a BC or technology service provider for the card-issuer
shall abide by the rules as prescribed in the instructions issued by RBI for such activities.
enriched_requirements.object: as prescribed in the instructions issued by RBI for such activities

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Prior approval shall not be required by the banks to become a co-branding partner of
card-issuers including Credit Card issuers.
enriched_requirements.object: banks to become a co-branding partner of card-issuers including Credit Card issuers

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The role of the co-branding partner shall be
as per the conditions stipulated under paragraph 24 and 25.
enriched_requirements.object: conditions stipulated under paragraph 24 and 25

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers shall keep internal records to enable operations to be traced and errors to
be rectified (taking into account the law of limitation for the time barred cases) as
prescribed under Reserve Bank of India (Local Area Banks - Know Your Customer)
Directions, 2025, as amended from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: enable operations to be traced and errors to be rectified (taking into account the law of limitation for the time barred case

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The cardholder shall be provided with a record of the transactions after they have
completed it, immediately in the form of receipt or another form such as the bank
statement / email / SMS.
enriched_requirements.object: record of the transactions after they have completed it, immediately in the form of receipt or another form such as the bank statem

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
With a view to reducing the instances of misuse of lost / stolen cards, it is recommended
to the card-issuers that they may consider issuing card with advanced features that may
evolve from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: advanced features that may evolve from time to time

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case card-issuers, at their discretion, decide to block / deactivate / suspend a debit
card, it shall be ensured that a standard operating procedure is followed as approved by
their Board.
enriched_requirements.object: standard operating procedure is followed as approved by their Board

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, it shall also be ensured that blocking / deactivating / suspending a
card or withdrawal of benefits available on any card is immediately intimated to the
cardholder along with reasons thereof through electronic means (SMS, email, etc.) and
other available modes.
enriched_requirements.object: blocking / deactivating / suspending a card or withdrawal of benefits available on any card is immediately intimated to the cardh

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers shall block a lost card immediately on being informed by the cardholder
and formalities, if any, can follow within a reasonable period clearly defined in the Board
approved policy.
enriched_requirements.object: immediately on being informed by the cardholder and formalities

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers shall provide to the cardholder the detailed procedure to report the loss,
theft or unauthorised use of card or PIN.
enriched_requirements.object: the detailed procedure to report the loss, theft or unauthorised use of card or PIN

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
They shall provide multiple channels such as
a dedicated helpline, dedicated number for SMS, dedicated e-mail-id, Interactive Voice
Response, clearly visible link on the website, internet banking and mobile-app or any
other mode for reporting an unauthorized transaction on 24 x 7 basis and allow the
customer to initiate the blocking of the card.
enriched_requirements.object: as a dedicated helpline, dedicated number for SMS, dedicated e-mail-id, Interactive Voice Response, clearly visible lin

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The process for blocking the card, dedicated
helpline as well as the SMS numbers, shall be adequately publicized.

Card-issuers shall immediately send a confirmation to the cardholder subsequent to the
blocking of a card.
enriched_requirements.object: to the cardholder subsequent to the blocking of a card

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: A card-issuer shall not dispatch a debit card to a customer unsolicited.
enriched_requirements.object: to a customer unsolicited

conditions:
In case of renewal
of an existing card
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of renewal
of an existing card, the cardholder shall be provided an option to decline the same if
they want to do so before dispatching the renewed card.
enriched_requirements.object: to decline the same if they want to do so before dispatching the renewed card

conditions:
in case a card is
blocked at the request of the cardholder
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, in case a card is
blocked at the request of the cardholder, replacement card in lieu of the blocked card
shall be issued with the explicit consent of the cardholder.
enriched_requirements.object: explicit consent of the cardholder

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Any discounts, cashbacks, reward points, loyalty points or any other benefits offered by
the card-issuer shall be provided in a transparent manner including source of such
benefits.
enriched_requirements.object: transparent manner including source of such benefits

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The accounting process for the same shall be verifiable in the books of the
card-issuer.
enriched_requirements.object: books of the card-issuer

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Detailed information regarding these benefits shall be displayed on the
website of the card-issuer and a copy of the same shall also be provided to the
cardholder.
enriched_requirements.object: website of the card-issuer and a copy of the same shall also be provided to the cardholder

conditions:
in case a card-issuer or a card payment network provides an insurance
cover
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
However, in case a card-issuer or a card payment network provides an insurance
cover, complimentary or chargeable (with the consent of the cardholder), the card-issuer
shall ensure that the relevant nomination details are recorded by the Insurance
Company and the availability of insurance is included, along with other information, in
every statement.
enriched_requirements.object: nomination details are recorded by the Insurance Company and the availability of insurance is included, along with other info

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The information shall also include the details regarding the insurance
cover, name / address and telephone number of the Insurance Company which will
handle the claims relating to the insurance cover.
enriched_requirements.object: regarding the insurance cover, name / address and telephone number of the Insurance Company which will handle the claims rela

conditions: In case of group insurance policy
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of group insurance policy, the
contact details of the concerned officials of the card-issuer shall be provided in the
statements.
enriched_requirements.object: statements

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The relationship between the card-issuer and the cardholder shall be contractual.

Card-
issuers shall make available to the cardholders in writing, a set of contractual terms and
conditions governing the issue and use of such cards.
enriched_requirements.object: cardholders in writing, a set of contractual terms and conditions governing the issue and use of such cards

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These terms shall be expressed
clearly and also maintain a fair balance between the interests of the parties concerned.
enriched_requirements.object: also maintain a fair balance between the interests of the parties concerned

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The terms and conditions for the issue and usage of a card shall be mentioned in clear
and simple language (preferably in English, Hindi and the local language)
comprehensible to the cardholder.
enriched_requirements.object: and simple language (preferably in English, Hindi and the local language) comprehensible to the cardholder

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers shall not levy any charge that was not explicitly indicated to the cardholder
at the time of issue of the card and without getting their explicit consent.
enriched_requirements.object: was not explicitly indicated to the cardholder at the time of issue of the card and without getting their explicit consent

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
However, this
<image>
shall not be applicable to charges like service taxes which may subsequently be levied
by the Government or any other statutory authority.
enriched_requirements.object: like service taxes which may subsequently be levied by the Government or any other statutory authority

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The details of all the charges
associated with cards shall be displayed on the card-issuer's website.
enriched_requirements.object: card-issuer's website

conditions: if any charged on specific transactions
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The convenience fee, if any charged on specific transactions, shall be indicated to the
cardholder in a transparent manner, prior to the transaction.
enriched_requirements.object: cardholder in a transparent manner, prior to the transaction

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The terms shall clearly specify the time-period for reversal of unsuccessful / failed
transactions and the compensation payable for failure to meet the specified timeline.
enriched_requirements.object: for reversal of unsuccessful / failed transactions and the compensation payable for failure to meet the specified time

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The terms may be altered by the card-issuer, but 30 days' notice of the change shall be
given to the cardholders to enable them to withdraw if they so choose.
enriched_requirements.object: cardholders to enable them to withdraw if they so choose

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The change in terms shall be notified to
the cardholder through all the communication channels available.
enriched_requirements.object: cardholder through all the communication channels available

conditions: if access is gained to such a record
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The terms shall put the cardholder under an obligation to take all appropriate steps to
keep the card safe and not to record the PIN or code, in any form that would be
intelligible or otherwise accessible to any third party if access is gained to such a record,
either honestly or dishonestly.
enriched_requirements.object: an obligation to take all appropriate steps to keep the card safe and not to record the PIN or code, in any form that would b

conditions:
when issuing PINs or
codes and shall be under an obligation not to disclose the cardholder's PIN or code to
anyone
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The terms shall specify that the card-issuer shall exercise care when issuing PINs or
codes and shall be under an obligation not to disclose the cardholder's PIN or code to
anyone, except to the cardholder.
enriched_requirements.object: shall exercise care when issuing PINs or codes and shall be under an obligation not to disclose the cardholder's PIN or code to anyone

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The issue of cards as a payment mechanism shall also be subject to relevant
instructions on cash withdrawal, issue of international card, security issues and risk
mitigation measures, card-to-card fund transfers, merchant discount rates structure,
failed ATM transactions, etc, issued by the Department of Payment and Settlement
Systems, Reserve Bank of India under the Payment and Settlement Systems Act, 2007,
and the Foreign Exchange Department, Reserve Bank of India under Foreign Exchange
Management Act, 1999, as amended from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: relevant instructions on cash withdrawal, issue of international card, security issues and risk mitigation measures, card-to-card f

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers shall put in place a Grievance Redressal Mechanism within the card
issuing entity and give wide publicity about it through electronic and print media.
enriched_requirements.object: Grievance Redressal Mechanism within the card issuing entity and give wide publicity about it through electronic and print media

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The
<image>
name, direct contact number, email-id and postal address of the designated grievance
redressal officer of the card-issuer shall be mentioned on the account statements.
enriched_requirements.object: account statements

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The
designated officer shall ensure that grievances of cardholders are redressed promptly
without any delay.
enriched_requirements.object: cardholders are redressed promptly without any delay

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The grievance redressal procedure and the Board approved policy
shall be displayed on the website of the card-issuer with a clearly visible link on the
homepage
enriched_requirements.object: website of the card-issuer with a clearly visible link on the homepage

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers shall ensure that their call centre staff are trained adequately to
competently handle and escalate, a complaint, if necessary.
enriched_requirements.object: centre staff are trained adequately to competently handle and escalate, a complaint

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Grievance Redressal
process shall have a provision for automatic escalation of unresolved complaints from a
call centre / base level to higher authorities.
enriched_requirements.object: automatic escalation of unresolved complaints from a call centre / base level to higher authorities

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
There shall be a system of acknowledging
customers' complaints for follow up, such as complaint number/docket number, even if
the complaints are received over phone.
enriched_requirements.object: acknowledging customers' complaints for follow up, such as complaint number/docket number, even if the complaints are received over pho

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers shall be liable to compensate the complainants for the loss of their time,
expenses, financial loss as well as for the harassment and mental anguish suffered by
them for the fault of the card-issuer and where the grievance has not been redressed in
time.
enriched_requirements.object: the complainants for the loss of their time, expenses, financial loss as well as for the harassment and mental anguish suffere

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For redressal of grievance, the customer must first approach the concerned card-
issuer.
enriched_requirements.object: card- issuer

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers shall not reveal any information relating to customers obtained at the time
of opening the account or issuing the card to any other person or organization without
obtaining their explicit consent, with regard to the purpose/s for which the information
will be used and the organizations with whom the information will be shared.
enriched_requirements.object: to customers obtained at the time of opening the account or issuing the card to any other person or organization witho

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Card-
<image>
issuers shall ensure strict compliance to the extant legal framework on data protection.
enriched_requirements.object: the extant legal framework on data protection

conditions:
in case where the customers give explicit consent for sharing the information
provided by them with other agencies
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, in case where the customers give explicit consent for sharing the information
provided by them with other agencies, card-issuers shall clearly state and explain to the
customer the full meaning / implications of the disclosure clause.
enriched_requirements.object: to the customer the full meaning / implications of the disclosure clause

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The information sought
from customers shall not be of such nature which will violate the provisions of law relating
to maintenance of secrecy in the transactions.
enriched_requirements.object: which will violate the provisions of law relating to maintenance of secrecy in the transactions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The card-issuers shall be solely
responsible for the correctness or otherwise of the data provided for the purpose.
enriched_requirements.object: the correctness or otherwise of the data provided for the purpose

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Under a co-branding arrangement, the co-branding entity shall not be permitted to
access any details of customer's accounts that may violate the card-issuer's secrecy
obligations.
enriched_requirements.object: any details of customer's accounts that may violate the card-issuer's secrecy obligations

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case, the co-branding arrangement
is between two banks, the card issuing bank shall ensure compliance with the relevant
instructions.
enriched_requirements.object: relevant instructions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers shall ensure adherence to the Reserve Bank of India
(Local Area Banks - Managing Risks in Outsourcing) Directions, 2025, as amended
from time to time, as amended from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: Reserve Bank of India (Local Area Banks - Managing Risks in Outsourcing) Directions, 2025, as amended from time to time, as am

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the card-issuers shall not share
card data (including transaction data) of the cardholders with the outsourcing partners
unless sharing of such data is essential to discharge the functions assigned to the latter.
enriched_requirements.object: transaction data) of the cardholders with the outsourcing partners unless sharing of such data is essential to discharge th

conditions: In case of sharing of any data as stated above
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of sharing of any data as stated above, explicit consent from the cardholder shall
be obtained.

It shall also be ensured that the storage and the ownership of card data
remains with the card-issuer.
enriched_requirements.object: the storage and the ownership of card data remains with the card-issuer

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The instructions / Directions on KYC / AML / CFT issued by RBI from time to time, shall
be strictly adhered to in respect of all cards issued, including co-branded cards.
enriched_requirements.object: in respect of all cards issued, including co-branded cards

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Directions, instructions and guidelines already repealed shall
continue to remain repealed.

Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken, or
initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue to be
governed by the provisions thereof.
enriched_requirements.object: by the provisions thereof

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All approvals or acknowledgments granted under
these repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: by these Directions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the
repeal of these directions, instructions, or guidelines shall not in any way prejudicially
affect:
(1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder;
enriched_requirements.object: affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted,
continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be
imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been
repealed.
enriched_requirements.object: enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of the
provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force.
enriched_requirements.object: and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order to remove
any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these Directions,
the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary clarifications in respect of any
matter covered herein and the interpretation of any provision of these Directions given
by the RBI shall be final and binding.
